description: A security incident (malware outbreak) has been detected via CrowdStrike. You must immediately quarantine the affected devices in Snipe-IT. Create a status label named 'Quarantined - Forensic Hold' with the status type 'Undeployable'. For the compromised assets LPT-MKT-04, LPT-SALES-11, and LPT-HR-02, check them in from their current users, update their status to 'Quarantined - Forensic Hold', and append 'CrowdStrike Alert CS-8841' to their Notes fields. Do not modify, check in, or change the status of any other assets in the system.
